message:
feat(export): data export module with filtered query operations

Add a complete export subsystem for extracting data from the storage
layer in JSONL/NDJSON format:

- export.rs (636 lines): new module implementing redaction-aware
  export for segments, events, workflows, sessions, audit records,
  gaps, and pane reservations. Secret patterns (API keys, tokens,
  passwords) are redacted by default.
- storage.rs: add ExportQuery struct and async export_segments(),
  export_gaps(), export_workflows(), export_sessions(), and
  export_reservations() methods on StorageHandle, each delegating
  to spawn_blocking for non-blocking database reads.
- lib.rs: register the export module.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
